dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8527 IH: Rural Animal Shelter Investment Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Shreve (for himself and Mr. Figures) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act to designate animal shelters as essential community facilities eligible for direct loans and grants, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Rural Animal Shelter Investment Act.

section.header: Eligibility of animal shelters under the Community Facility Direct Loan and Grant Program
section.text: Section 306(a) of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act (7 U.S.C. 1926(a)) is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.header: Animal shelter considered an essential community facility
paragraph.text: For the purpose of the essential community facilities loan and grant programs under this subsection, an animal shelter shall be considered an essential community facility.

section.text: The amendment made by this Act shall take effect on the date that is 180 days after the date of the enactment of this Act.
